Aeët.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2970.tlg001:7:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.92</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
